arts.ttl: England captain Kane feels he is 'taken for granted'
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane says he is "taken for granted" and feels people have become "bored" of his goalscoring record.

arts.ttl: England captain Harry Kane believes fans are ‘bored’ by his goalscoring ability
arts.sum: The 31-year-old is the country’s record goalscorer with 69 and shows no signs of slowing down.

arts.ttl: Stick to football: Thomas Tuchel has no interest in 'political statements' as England head coach
arts.sum: In stark contrast to predecessor Gareth Southgate, the new manager will only focus on the pitch

arts.ttl: Harry Kane: I am more respected since leaving Tottenham for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: The England captain feels his Ballon d’Or chances have drastically improved

arts.sum: From Jude Bellingham decisions to questioning the 1966 World Cup win

arts.ttl: 'Complicated' but 'honest' - Tuchel's path from barman to England boss

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel ridicules long-held England excuse with emphatic two-word message

arts.ttl: Harry Kane hails Jordan Henderson England recall and makes Euro 2024 admission
arts.sum: England captain Harry Kane has admitted his side lacked leadership at Euro 2024 and is pleased to see Jordan Henderson back in the Three Lions fold

arts.ttl: Harry Kane targeting Ballon d'Or as he revels in new 'aura' since Bayern Munich switch

arts.ttl: Inside Thomas Tuchel’s grand plan – and the reason England hired him
